_comment: Leaf drop tables (items.md §1.B). A table answers one question -- 'given a roll against this pool, what comes out?' -- and knows nothing about who rolled it. Reward profiles in rewards.json compose these into what a specific source drops.
_equipment_comment: Equipment tables state a flat drop_chance rather than weighting a 'nothing' entry against the bases. Base rarity already lives in each base's drop_tier, and a nothing-weight would make the real drop rate drift every time a new base was added to the item files.
